examples.text: مَا مِنْكُم مِن أَحَدٍ إِلَّا سَيُكَلَّمُهُ رَبُّهُ لَيْسَ بَيْنَهُ وَبَيْنَهُ تُرْجُمَانٌ
examples.english: Everyone of you will speak to his Lord without an interpreter between them.

etymology.text:
From Classical Syriac ܬܰܪܓܡܳܢܳܐ (targmānā, “interpreter”), itself from Akkadian 𒅴𒁄 (targumannum, “interpreter”); see the root entry for further information.
Cognate of Hebrew תֻּרְגְּמָן (turgmán).
